item.title: Access OpenAI models and Codex through your Oracle cloud commitment
item.description: Focus: Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.

item.title: NVIDIA Accelerates Google DeepMind’s DiffusionGemma for Local AI
item.description: Focus: Today, Google DeepMind released DiffusionGemma — an experimental open model built for exceptionally fast text generation. NVIDIA has optimized DiffusionGemma to run even faster across NVIDIA GeForce RTX GPUs, the NVIDIA RTX PRO platform and NVIDIA DGX Spark systems, from local PCs to the clou

item.title: Seoul Purpose: How NVIDIA and South Korea Are Building the Future of AI
item.description: Focus: Home to cutting-edge sovereign AI infrastructure and robotics innovators, as well as one of the world’s most passionate gaming communities, South Korea is one of the world’s centers of AI. NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang is in Seoul this week to meet the partners and builders behind that

item.title: PRC-linked influence operations are targeting AI debates in the US
item.description: Focus: A new report from OpenAI details PRC-linked influence operations using AI to target U.S. tech debates, data center narratives, tariffs, and false claims about ChatGPT.

item.title: From data to decisions: how LSEG is scaling trusted AI
item.description: Focus: See how LSEG uses OpenAI to scale trusted AI across its global business, accelerating insights, shrinking release cycles, and empowering 4,000 employees.

item.title: Direct Preference Optimization Beyond Chatbots
item.description: Focus: Hugging Face Blog has a new AI-related update around 'Direct Preference Optimization Beyond Chatbots', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: How engineers at Nextdoor use Codex to build without limits
item.description: Focus: How engineers at Nextdoor use Codex with GPT-5.5 to investigate hard-to-reproduce issues, build across platforms, and focus on product outcomes.

item.title: What Codex unlocks for Notion
item.description: Focus: How Notion uses Codex to one-shot specs, build AI Voice Input for the web, and multiply engineering power across small teams.

item.title: Industrial policy for the Intelligence Age
item.description: Focus: Explore our ambitious, people-first industrial policy ideas for the AI era—focused on expanding opportunity, sharing prosperity, and building resilient institutions as advanced intelligence evolves.

item.title: How an astrophysicist uses Codex to help simulate black holes
item.description: Focus: Discover how astrophysicist Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations, helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity.

item.title: Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety: Customizable Multimodal Safety for Global Enterprise AI
item.description: Focus: Hugging Face Blog has a new AI-related update around 'Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety: Customizable Multimodal Safety for Global Enterprise AI', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: Designing the hf CLI as an agent-optimized way to work with the Hub
item.description: Focus: Hugging Face Blog has a new AI-related update around 'Designing the hf CLI as an agent-optimized way to work with the Hub', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: Confidential submission of draft S-1 to the SEC
item.description: Focus: OpenAI confirms a confidential S-1 submission to the SEC and has not yet determined timing for further action.

item.title: The Open Source Community is backing OpenEnv for Agentic RL
item.description: Focus: Hugging Face Blog has a new AI-related update around 'The Open Source Community is backing OpenEnv for Agentic RL', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: Building trust in enterprise AI: Together AI earns ISO 27001:2022 certification
item.description: Focus: Together AI has earned ISO 27001:2022 certification, validating our commitment to enterprise-grade security for production AI workloads.

item.title: Benchmarking inference at scale: coding agents
item.description: Focus: Real-world inference benchmarks for coding agents: 31% more TPS than TensorRT-LLM, 2× better TTFT at saturation, and 76% lower cost than Claude Opus 4.6.

item.title: How Together AI built the world’s fastest speech-to-text stack
item.description: Focus: Together AI built the fastest speech-to-text stack on Artificial Analysis by treating ASR as a full-path systems problem, not just a GPU inference problem.

item.title: Together AI and Pearl Research Labs Team Up to Reduce the Cost of AI Inference
item.description: Focus: Together AI partners with Pearl Research Labs to launch a discounted Pearl-powered inference endpoint for Gemma-4-31B-it-pearl, using Proof of Useful Work to turn AI workloads into crypto emissions.
